description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this black clutch from yelloe comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Dimensions : 13 cm x 27 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas two concealed metallic buttoned closures Three inner zipped pockets for additional spaceAnimal print on the outside for styleBranding appliquéd on the frontCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
